html:
Exclusive to:
Only during the Event: Hallowed Nights

“Can be planted in the ground.”

-

The Arboretum Experiment is a feature exclusive to the Hallowed Nights event in Don't Starve Together. It can be conducted at the Mad Scientist Lab, using a Batilisk Wing and a Living Log, and depleting 20 for the player.

The experiment will result in a Totally Normal Root that can be planted to create a Totally Normal Sapling. This will grow into a Totally Normal Tree over time that can be decorated using Halloween Decorations. The Totally Normal Root can also be used as Fire Fuel.

Multiple potions are produced when crafting. There is chance 20% to craft 1 of them, 60% to craft 2 and 20% to craft 3.

Trivia

  • The Mad Scientist Lab and all related craftable Items were introduced to the Hallowed Nights event in 2018.
  • The Arboretum Experiment is the only Mad Science experiment to only have one possible outcome.

Gallery

  • All Hallowed Nights potions on the ground.
  • A planted Totally Normal Root.
  • A Totally Normal Sapling.
  • Concept art for various potions from Rhymes with Play #212.
Hallowed NightsCraftable Items

“Something's in there! I'll have to root it out.”
–Wilson
“It's a stick. But I can't even set it on fire.”
–Willow
“Hello little sticky!”
–Wolfgang
“Potential horror.”
–Wendy
“DIMINUTIVE WOOD BASED LIFE FORM”
–WX-78
“The root cutting of a beastly tree.”
–Wickerbottom
“Hey there's a piece of wood in there.”
–Woodie
“Ah. A chance to grow something horrible.”
–Maxwell
“I hath birthed the röot öf terrör!”
–Wigfrid
“We should plant this somewhere.”
–Webber
“Edible roots, perhaps?”
–Warly
“Needs dirt”
–Wormwood
“Oh hey! There's a little stick in there.”
–Winona
“Rooty toot toot!”
–Wortox
“Still roots left!”
–Wurt
“There's a tree inside just waiting to come out!”
–Walter
“The root inside is particularly lively.”
–Wanda
“Can be planted in the ground.”
-

The experiment will result in a Totally Normal Root that can be planted to create a Totally Normal Sapling. This will grow into a Totally Normal Tree over time that can be decorated using Halloween Decorations. The Totally Normal Root can also be used as Fire Fuel.

summaryViHtml:
Tóm tắt

Thí nghiệm Vườn ươm là một tính năng dành riêng cho sự kiện Đêm thiêng liêng trong Don't Starve Together. Nó có thể được tiến hành tại Phòng thí nghiệm khoa học điên, sử dụng Cánh Tử xà và Nhật ký sống, đồng thời làm cạn kiệt 20 của người chơi.

The '''Arboretum Experiment''' is a feature exclusive to the [[Hallowed Nights]] [[:Category:Events|event]] in ''[[Don't Starve Together]]''. It can be conducted at the [[Mad Scientist Lab]], using a [[Batilisk Wing]] and a [[Living Log]], and depleting 20 {{Sanity}} for the player.

The experiment will result in a '''Totally Normal Root''' that can be planted to create a Totally Normal Sapling. This will grow into a [[Tree/Totally Normal|Totally Normal Tree]] over time that can be decorated using [[Halloween Decorations]]. The Totally Normal Root can also be used as [[Fire]] [[Fuel]].

Multiple potions are produced when crafting. There is chance 20% to craft 1 of them, 60% to craft 2 and 20% to craft 3.

== {{Pic32|Placeholder}} Trivia ==
* The Mad Scientist Lab and all related craftable Items were introduced to the Hallowed Nights event in 2018.
* The Arboretum Experiment is the only Mad Science experiment to only have one possible outcome.
